title: The Tower Battles Begin
description: Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Spandam, Nami, Nico Robin. Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There's no way there'd be any.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes... using "suspicious girl" as a clue.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: An island far northeast of ohara.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: But we lost her again shortly after...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's true, I saw the brat escaping

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: From the burning charm with a boat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A scholar who can decipher poneglyphs...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: It's that... the Survivor of "ohara's demons"...

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: No wonder it's such a price...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: for helping me all the time...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: No, thank you for letting me work.

summary: Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.
